1.evaluator_summary: All 18 tasks passing. 213 tests green. All 7 exit criteria verified: prompt acceptance, Claude streaming, 6 tools behind safety boundary, TUI display, non-interactive mode with tool policy, mock-provider CI. Ready for Phase 2.
